text:
Cursor is officially AGI.

Time for devs to pack their bags.

Cursor agent with the 0.43.3 update is crazy.

You can just let it code while you go to the beach.

i'm starting a discord for vibe coders

people serious about building with AI tools like cursor, bolt, lovable, v0, claude code, etc

the goal: work together, chat, share tips/tricks, and support each other

leave a reply here if you want to be added

let's get better together

v0 is officially cooked.

Full stack apps? Forget about it.

@lovable_dev absolutely blows v0 out of the water.

It's not even close.

This is the smoothest Supabase integration with an AI coding agent I've ever seen.

If you're serious about building a SaaS and hitting $10k/month in 2025, here's the best AI-powered stack to get you there FAST:

Core Development Tools 

Cursor → The best AI coding IDE for productivity and debugging.
Bolt → Build and deploy micro SaaS quickly.
Lovable →

I just cloned the Cursor website from a single screenshot.

In 30 seconds flat.

This tool feels like AGI.

Web developers are done.
